    FROM Document_Objects do
    JOIN Document_Subset_Members dsm ON do.Document_Object_ID = dsm.Document_Object_ID
    WHERE do.Owner = 'Ransom'
    UNION
    -- Case 2: Ransom-owned document is the 'Related_Document_Object_ID', so the related doc is 'Document_Object_ID'
    SELECT dsm.Document_Object_ID AS doc_id
    FROM Document_Objects do

FROM Document_Objects ransom_docs
JOIN Document_Subset_Members dsm 
    ON ransom_docs.Document_Object_ID = dsm.Document_Object_ID 
    OR ransom_docs.Document_Object_ID = dsm.Related_Document_Object_ID
WHERE ransom_docs.Owner = 'Ransom'
    AND ransom_docs.Document_Object_ID != CASE

WITH ChicagoCode AS (
    SELECT city_code 
    FROM City 
    WHERE city_name = 'Chicago'
),
DistancesFromChicago AS (
    SELECT 
        CASE 
            WHEN d.city1_code = c.city_code THEN d.city2_code 
            ELSE d.city1_code 
        END AS other_city_code,
        d.distance
    FROM Direct_distance d
    CROSS JOIN ChicagoCode c
    WHERE d.city1_code = c.city_code OR d.city2_code = c.city_code
),
MinDistance AS (
    SELECT MIN(distance) AS min_distance
    FROM DistancesFromChicago
    WHERE distance > 0
)
SELECT city_name
FROM City
WHERE city_code IN (
    SELECT other_city_code
    FROM DistancesFromChicago
    WHERE distance = (SELECT min_distance FROM MinDistance)
);

WITH LindaCity AS (
    SELECT city_code
    FROM Student
    WHERE Fname = 'Linda' AND LName = 'Smith'
),
Distances AS (
    SELECT 
        s.StuID,
        s.Fname,
        s.Lname,
        COALESCE(dd1.distance, dd2.distance) AS distance
    FROM Student s
    CROSS JOIN LindaCity lc
    LEFT JOIN Direct_distance dd1 
        ON dd1.city1_code = lc.city_code 
        AND dd1.city2_code = s.city_code
    LEFT JOIN Direct_distance dd2 
        ON dd2.city2_code = lc.city_code 
        AND dd2.city1_code = s.city_code
    WHERE s.Fname != 'Linda' OR s.Lname != 'Smith'
        AND (dd1.distance IS NOT NULL OR dd2.distance IS NOT NULL)
)
SELECT Fname || ' ' || Lname AS full_name
FROM Distances
ORDER BY distance DESC
LIMIT 1;
837:
WITH LindaCity AS (
    SELECT c.latitude, c.longitude
    FROM Student s
    JOIN City c ON s.city_code = c.city_code
    WHERE s.Fname = 'Linda' AND s.Lname = 'Smith'
),
StudentDistances AS (
    SELECT 
        s.Fname,
        s.Lname,
        -- Haversine formula to calculate distance in kilometers
        6371 * ACOS(
            COS(RADIANS(lc.latitude)) * COS(RADIANS(c.latitude)) *
            COS(RADIANS(c.longitude) - RADIANS(lc.longitude)) +
            SIN(RADIANS(lc.latitude)) * SIN(RADIANS(c.latitude))
        ) AS distance
    FROM Student s
    JOIN City c ON s.city_code = c.city_code
    CROSS JOIN LindaCity lc
    WHERE NOT (s.Fname = 'Linda' AND s.Lname = 'Smith')
)
SELECT Fname, Lname
FROM StudentDistances
WHERE distance = (SELECT MAX(distance) FROM StudentDistances);

        al.author_id,

),

)

2089:
WITH InvoiceCounts AS (
    SELECT 
        client_id, 
        COUNT(*) AS invoice_count
    FROM Invoices
    GROUP BY client_id
),
MaxCount AS (
    SELECT MAX(invoice_count) AS max_invoice_count
    FROM InvoiceCounts
)
SELECT 
    c.client_id, 
    c.client_details
FROM Clients c
JOIN InvoiceCounts ic ON c.client_id = ic.client_id
JOIN MaxCount mc ON ic.invoice_count = mc.max_invoice_count;

        COUNT(*) AS invoice_count
    FROM Invoices

)
SELECT

    c.client_details
FROM Clients c
JOIN InvoiceCounts ic ON c.client_id = ic.client_id
WHERE ic.invoice_count = (SELECT MAX(invoice_count) FROM InvoiceCounts);
